body.title: Cleanup kernel.py debris in DB — remove tier2 attractor signal
body.result: Shipped in 3227df8f. One-shot cleanup: deleted 3 stale kernel.py-referencing memories (FACTUAL 20260405215531513683/481693 + EPISODIC 20260405213427317066), flagged T-scope-guard-reattempt-loop + T-scope-guard-echo-dedup with metadata['superseded_by']='T-situate-kernel-hallucination-fix'. Count dropped 9→6. Script idempotent (id-existence + superseded_by guard); FK children (memory_embeddings, memory_blobs, interpretive_edges) cleaned before delete.
body.description:
8 memory rows in wild-0001 reference brainstem/kernel.py; three of them are stale CC-to-Igor corrections from 2026-04-05 (shape: 'SPAWNIF belongs in cognition/node_executor.py — NOT brainstem/kernel.py or memory/models.py'). The negation doesn't survive retrieval — tier2 Qwen just sees 'brainstem/kernel.py' co-located with SITUATE/HIGH-inertia language and reaches for it as a canonical target.

Action:
1. Delete the 3 stale messages (two are duplicate ingests of the same CC message — from ch=repl and ch=web:? — plus one EPISODIC copy):
   - id 20260405215531513683 (FACTUAL, ch=repl)
   - id 20260405215531481693 (FACTUAL, ch=web:?)
   - id 20260405213427317066 (EPISODIC)
2. Add metadata flag 'superseded_by=T-situate-kernel-hallucination-fix' to the two old ticket narratives (T-scope-guard-reattempt-loop, T-scope-guard-echo-dedup) so they deprioritize in retrieval but remain readable.
3. Note: SLATE-20260414 (REFERENCE) is a generated slate snapshot — leave alone (regenerated from slate file).

**Affected files:** one-shot script under lab/claudecode/ (e.g. cleanup_kernel_debris.py) — no persistent code.
**Design rules:** none apply — one-shot DB maintenance.
**Scope boundary:** IN — delete 3 specific memory ids, flag 2 ticket memories. OUT — touching memory_palace, word_graph, or any other kernel-referencing rows beyond the named 5.
**Test plan:** no tests because: one-shot cleanup. Verify success by re-running SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memories WHERE narrative ILIKE '%brainstem/kernel%' — expect drop from 8 to 5 (3 new memories from T-situate-kernel-hallucination-fix activity + 2 old tickets + this ticket's own narrative). Script runs under IGOR_HOME_DB_URL, idempotent (guarded by id existence).
